creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Go ahead, I don't think there is a need to bump
 the $PORTREVISION.
 
 On Sat, 1 May 2010, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
 > -PORTREVISION=	3
 > +PORTREVISION=	4
 
 By the way, maybe we should start putting
 jython.jar in the standard CLASSPATH 
 as provided by the classpath utility?
 
 --Marcin
